description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits irregular margins with evidence of necrosis and chlorosis. Leaf shape is generally ovate, but distorted due to damage. Texture appears slightly leathery."} {"description": "Multiple, small (1-3mm diameter) lesions are present. Lesions are predominantly dark brown to black, punctate, and slightly raised. Some lesions exhibit a halo of chlorotic tissue. Evidence of marginal necrosis is also present, appearing as a brown, dry border."} Lesions are scattered across the leaf surface, with a higher concentration towards the margins. Marginal necrosis is continuous along a significant portion of the leaf perimeter. No apparent pattern to lesion distribution beyond marginal preference.
